title: Local obituary: Jeffrey Holland, 44, Boston fifth-grade teacher from Canton
author: Boston.com Staff
bullets: Jeffrey J.
Holland, a lifelong resident of Canton and devoted educator, passed away on June 12, 2026, in Boston, Massachusetts, at the age of 44.
Born on October 23, 1981, in Boston, Massachusetts, he was the son of Laura Holland of Canton and the late John Holland.

title: 20-year-old Mass. hiker dies after medical event in Monadnock State Park
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News Joshua Luth, of Lancaster, died despite the efforts of first responders and good Samaritans.
Mount Monadnock, as seen from Tully Mountain in Massachusetts.
handout A Massachusetts man died after suffering a “medical incident” while hiking in Monadnock State Park in New Hampshire Saturday.

title: Accused Cape Cod restaurant shooter was acting in self-defense, lawyer says
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime “I didn't want to die,” alleged gunman Nicholos D.
Campbell, 26, told police after the shooting.

By Abby Patkin updated on June 15, 2026 | 1:23 PM 2 minutes to read A Cape Cod man accused of shooting and killing another patron at a restaurant in Dennis Saturday was acting in self-defense after he was stabbed in the head, according to his lawyer.

title: Man drowns while swimming with friends in N.H. pond
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News The incident occurred Sunday afternoon at Wilson Pond in Swanzey, New Hampshire.
A man drowned while swimming with friends in a pond in Swanzey, New Hampshire, Sunday.
The man, 42-year-old Fredy Gavilanes Jami of Ecuador, was swimming with three friends in Wilson Pond Sunday afternoon.

title: 2-alarm fire kills 2 residents in Bellingham
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The cause of the fire remains under investigation.
Two people died following a fire at a single-family home in Bellingham early Monday morning, according to officials.
The Bellingham Fire Department responded to 15 Temi Road for a house fire Monday at 12:40 a.

title: 3 hospitalized after shooting near South End playground
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News The shooting occurred near O'Day Playground on Sunday night.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
Three people were shot near a playground in the South End Sunday night, according to Boston police.

title: R.I. man sentenced to life without parole after conviction in 2021 North Attleborough murder
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime The East Providence man was found guilty of first-degree murder in the fatal shooting of Peter Schifone.

An East Providence, Rhode Island man was sentenced Friday to life in prison without the possibility of parole after a jury found him guilty of a 2021 fatal shooting in North Attleborough, prosecutors announced.

Following a trial in Fall River Superior Court that began June 1, a jury convicted 38-year-old Adam Walker of first-degree murder, carrying a firearm, and carrying a loaded firearm, according to court documents.
